en.extract:
The Enggano scops owl (Otus enganensis) is an owl endemic to Enggano Island, Indonesia.


References

BirdLife Species Factsheet - Enggano Scops-owl
Red Data Book

The '''Enggano scops owl''' ('''''Otus enganensis''''') is an owl endemic to [[Enggano Island]], [[Indonesia]].
